title: Genre Poster Studies
description: Five independent mobile-first poster studies for revenge, romance, republican intrigue, exile melodrama, and culinary rivalry short dramas.
creative_direction: This package widens the theme beyond one lead pair. Every image is a self-contained 9:16 short-drama cover with clear emotional hooks, disciplined character placement, and reserved zones for platform-style labels without relying on actual readable text.

en.title: Genre Poster Studies
en.description: Five independent mobile-first poster studies for revenge, romance, republican intrigue, exile melodrama, and culinary rivalry short dramas.

zh-CN.title: 类型短剧封面研究
zh-CN.description: 五张独立的 9:16 短剧封面研究图，覆盖复仇、爱情、民国秘闻、流放和美食对抗等题材。
